project_info.name: Travel Sahabat Wisata Jember
project_info.target_audience: Local Jember residents seeking intercity travel and tours. 80% mobile users.
project_info.tech_stack: React.js + Tailwind CSS + Lucide React (No Next.js, no backend)

theme_archetype.name: Organic & Earthy
theme_archetype.reasoning: Fits the 'Jalan Pulang' theme. Warm, grounded, trustworthy, and local.

primary.description: Amber/Saffron. Used for brand accents, primary non-WA buttons, highlights.

whatsapp.description: Teal. Exclusively used for WhatsApp CTAs to drive lead generation.

background.description: Warm White (stone-50) for base to avoid clinical stark white. White for cards.

hierarchy.h1: font-heading text-4xl sm:text-5xl font-extrabold tracking-tight text-stone-900 leading-tight
hierarchy.h2: font-heading text-2xl sm:text-3xl font-bold tracking-tight text-stone-900
hierarchy.h3: font-heading text-xl sm:text-2xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-stone-800

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Mobile-first priority. Generous internal padding (p-6, p-8) for cards to prevent text collision. Dense data but readable.
spacing_and_layout.container: w-full max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8

hero_background.description: Mount Bromo sunrise, represents local tourism and wonder.

components_and_sections.name: Transparent to Solid Navbar
components_and_sections.requirements: Fixed top. Transparent on initial load, transitions to solid white (bg-white shadow-sm) on scroll. Logo left, WhatsApp CTA button right. Mobile menu toggles full screen.

components_and_sections.name: Hero Section & Search Box
components_and_sections.requirements: Full-width background image (hero_background) with bg-black/40 overlay. Headline: clear, benefit-driven. Subheadline: short. Core Feature: A white card (bg-white rounded-xl shadow-xl p-4 sm:p-6) acting as a 'Search Box'. It has 4 Tabs: Travel, Wisata, Armada, Rombongan. Each tab has a simple form (e.g., Destination, Date) that does NOT submit to a backend, but generates a pre-filled WhatsApp message URL and opens it.

components_and_sections.name: Trust Bar
components_and_sections.requirements: Horizontal strip below hero. 4 items (e.g., Berpengalaman, Armada Terawat, Driver Profesional, Harga Jujur). Use Lucide icons (ShieldCheck, Wrench, UserCheck, Banknote). Grid 2x2 on mobile, 4x1 on desktop.

components_and_sections.name: Layanan Kami
components_and_sections.requirements: 4 Cards: Travel Reguler, Paket Wisata, Sewa Armada, Rombongan. White cards on stone-50 background. Card hover effect applied. Each has a 'Pesan via WA' secondary button.

components_and_sections.name: Rute Populer
components_and_sections.requirements: 3 Cards (Jember-Surabaya, Jember-Malang, Jember-Bali). Show price starting from (Mulai Rp XXX.XXX). Include a Teal WA CTA on each card.

components_and_sections.name: Paket Wisata Pilihan
components_and_sections.requirements: 2-3 Cards using the tour_bromo, tour_ijen images. Show key highlights (Transport, Tiket, Guide). Primary WA CTA.

components_and_sections.name: Armada Kami
components_and_sections.requirements: Showcase of vehicles (Hiace, Elf, Innova). Use fleet_hiace image. List capacities (14 Seat, 19 Seat, etc).

components_and_sections.name: Alur Pemesanan
components_and_sections.requirements: 4-5 steps (Hubungi WA -> Pilih Layanan -> Konfirmasi -> Berangkat). Vertical timeline on mobile, horizontal steps on desktop.

components_and_sections.name: FAQ Ringkas
components_and_sections.requirements: Accordion style. 4-5 common questions (Bisa jemput di rumah?, DP berapa?, dll). Use standard HTML details/summary or headless UI if preferred, styled cleanly.

components_and_sections.name: Closing Banner
components_and_sections.requirements: Amber-500 background block. Bold white text. Large Teal WhatsApp button. High contrast.

components_and_sections.name: Footer
components_and_sections.requirements: 4 columns on desktop, stack on mobile. Col 1: Brand & Desc, Col 2: Layanan, Col 3: Kontak (Address, WA, Email), Col 4: Social Media. Dark background (stone-900) for contrast, or light stone-100.

components_and_sections.name: Floating WhatsApp Button
components_and_sections.requirements: Fixed bottom-right. Always visible (z-50). Teal color. Uses animate-pulse every 3 seconds to draw attention without being annoying.

testing_attributes.rule: All interactive elements (buttons, form inputs, tabs, accordions) MUST include data-testid attribute.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly adhere to the Amber/Teal/Warm White color scheme.
Do not implement an actual backend or booking engine. All forms must serialize into a WhatsApp deep link (https://wa.me/6285732431396?text=...).
Do not use generic UI libraries that conflict with Tailwind without heavy customization. Raw Tailwind is preferred for marketing layouts.
Apply generous padding (p-6, p-8) inside cards.
Use 'Plus Jakarta Sans' for headings and 'Inter' for body. Import them via Google Fonts in index.css or index.html.
